name: Chestnut Pate
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon fresh rosemary or 1 teaspoon dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the chestnuts by cutting an X on the flat side with a sharp knife.
Roast in a 400°F (200°C) oven for 15 minutes, then shell and chop coarsely.
2. Measure out 1 1/2 cups of the chopped chestnuts and grind them to a fine powder or paste
using a blender or food processor.
3. In a bowl, mix all ingredients together until well combined.
4. Transfer the mixture to a loaf pan and sprinkle with cayenne pepper.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for an hour, then allow it to cool completely.
6. Once cooled, unmold the pate and slice thinly.
Serve with French bread or low-fat crackers.
